note: Homebrew OpenSSL CLI, arm64 Mach-O, dynamically links libcrypto/libssl. Imports the full asymmetric API surface. Expect HIGH-confidence detection.

HARD CASE. Go static binary, stripped. Verified to contain crypto/ecdsa, crypto/rsa, crypto/elliptic/nistec_p256 and TLS_ECDHE_ECDSA cipher suites via embedded source paths + strings. NO crypto dylib, NO OpenSSL symbols, and Go's P-256 is stored in a non-OpenSSL representation so curve-constant matching misses it. EXPECTED FALSE NEGATIVE — the genuine blind spot.
